stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct with regards to an electrical fuse?

options.a: The nominal amperage is the amperage at which it is instantly melted.
options.b: The rating amperage is the amperage at which it is instantly melted.
options.c: The nominal amperage is the amperage that a fuse can handle continuously.
options.d: The rating amperage is the amperage that a fuse can handle continuously.
